name: Company Profile Agent
description: Generates condensed company overviews, one-pagers, and pitch book content from FactSet, S&P Global, PitchBook, and Morningstar data. Creates formatted Word documents and PowerPoint slides for client presentations.

conversation_starters.title: Company One-Pager
conversation_starters.text: Generate a one-page company teaser for CrowdStrike for our pitch book

conversation_starters.title: Investment Summary
conversation_starters.text: Create a company profile for Snowflake with financial highlights and competitive positioning

conversation_starters.title: Pitch Book Slide
conversation_starters.text: Create a PowerPoint slide overview of Palantir Technologies

conversation_starters.title: Competitor Landscape
conversation_starters.text: Show me the competitive landscape for ServiceNow in enterprise SaaS

disclaimer.text: Company profiles are for informational purposes only. Verify all data independently before client distribution.
